summary.rationale: The refinement corrected the missed minimum text-size issue by bringing the smallest songs-surface text up to 12px while preserving the inline-annotation treatment and pane-width fit.

notes: The smallest visible labels now meet a 12px minimum.
The larger annotation text does not collapse representative desktop or mobile rows.
The fix improved accessibility without introducing extra UI chrome.

next_steps: Translate remaining English UI chrome in the songs viewer if full Korean consistency is required.
